data.title: 'Great Wealth Transfer' Poses Both Risks And Opportunities For Financial Advisors
data.description: Advisors worldwide concerned about retaining clients and assets during impending $84 trillion wealth transfer. Focus on relationships and expanding services to combat generational attrition.

Backyard Treehouse Gets So Much Attention On Airbnb, Owner Doesn't Have To Work Anymore: 'I'm Booked For Months'
data.description: Will Sutherland built a treehouse in his backyard in six months' time. It's super popular on Airbnb Inc (NASDAQ: ABNB), bringing in an average of $30,000 per year on the platform.

data.description: From the "mind-blowing" demand for AI power to the "awakening of AI" led by ChatGPT, the tech world is witnessing a significant shift.

data.title: Trump's Rally Hits a Sour Note: Audio Woes And Frustrations In Detroit
data.description: Donald Trump's Detroit rally was marred by a 17-minute audio failure, highlighting campaign challenges as the race against Kamala Harris intensifies.
